name: Mary Jo's Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Combine and soak a minimum of 3 hours the poppy seeds and milk. When ready to bake cake, cream together butter and sugar until light. Sift together cake flour, salt, and baking powder. Add sifted ingredients to creamed mixture, alternately with poppy seed milk mixture, mixing well. Quickly beat egg whites until stiff and fold into mixture. Pour into 2 greased and floured 9-inch pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until lightly browned and springy. Cool cake in pans for 10 minutes on racks. Turn out and cool completely.
FROSTING: Combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan. Beat together, then add egg yolks and milk, mixing until smooth. Add broken pecans and cook very slowly, stirring frequently to prevent burning until thick like filling, about 20-25 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. When frosting is cool, spread between layers and on top of poppy seed cake.
